title: Solar System Planetary Quantum Numbers — Shape + Orbital Catalog
_fixture_purpose: Catalogs QN tuples for 10 solar system bodies. Each eccentricity gives a best-fit QN with C²+F²=G². Harmonic connections verified: Earth-Jupiter shared b=59, Earth-Uranus shared b=101, Mars shape/orbit GCD=30. Characteristic latitude = arcsin(√(2ε/(1+ε²))) computed for all.

bodies.name: Earth_shape
bodies._note: CANONICAL from Iverson/Dale. 101 prime. Tropic match Δ=0.34°.

bodies.name: Jupiter_shape
bodies._note: Most oblate planet with QN. 151 prime.

bodies.name: Jupiter_orbit
bodies._note: b=59 = Earth orbit b! Shared prime → harmonic.

bodies.name: Saturn_shape
bodies._note: b=79, d=139, a=199 ALL PRIME. AP step 60=e. Extraordinary.

bodies.name: Saturn_orbit
bodies._note: 23 prime. d=427 shared with Jupiter shape d!

bodies.name: Uranus_orbit
bodies._note: b=101 = Earth shape b! Cross-domain harmonic.

harmonic_connections._note: Earth orbit b=59, Jupiter orbit b=59. Same prime generator. Earth-Jupiter 12:1 orbital period ratio is the strongest gravitational coupling in the inner solar system.
Earth shape b=101, Uranus orbit b=101. Cross-domain harmonic: one body's shape resonates with another's orbit.
Mars shape product and orbit product share GCD with factor 2. Same body shape↔orbit link.

qa_connection.universal_formula: char_lat = arcsin(√(2ε/(1+ε²))) gives every body a characteristic latitude from its eccentricity alone. This is purely algebraic — no physics, just number theory.
qa_connection.harmonic_law: Bodies sharing QN prime factors are harmonically linked per [149]. Earth-Jupiter b=59 sharing is the most striking: the strongest gravitational pair shares a prime generator.
qa_connection.saturn_ap: Saturn's (79,139,199) prime arithmetic progression with step e=60 is number-theoretically exceptional. The probability of three consecutive QN components all being prime is very low.
qa_connection.honest_limits: Characteristic latitude matches surface features ONLY for Earth (Tropic, Δ=0.34°, p≈0.013). Other bodies show no obvious feature correlation. The catalog is structural, not predictive.
